verse_text: And thus I saw the horses in the vision: those who sat on them had breastplates of fiery red, hyacinth blue, and sulfur yellow; and the heads of the horses were like the heads of lions; and out of their mouths came fire, smoke, and brimstone.

pericope.title: Trumpet Six, Woe Two: The Plagues

symbolic.title: Example: The Cherubim of Ezekiel I
